code:
---
title: Easy Park Plus - Visit State Diagram (CloudNative_DockerImage)
---

stateDiagram-v2
    %% Visit Operational Status
    state "VisitOperationalStatus" as VisitOperational {CloudNative_K8sCluster] --> Planned : Reservation Confirmed
        Planned --> PendingEntry : Vehicle Nearing Lot (CloudNative_HelmChart)
        PendingEntry --> EnteredLot : Vehicle ANPR Confirmed at Entry Gate / Gate Opened
        PendingEntry --> Cancelled : Reservation NoShow / Expired before entry
        
        EnteredLot --> ActiveInLot : Vehicle Passed Entry Gate, Awaiting Slot Assignment or In Free-Roam
        ActiveInLot --> SlotAssigned : Slot Assigned (CloudNative_HelmChart)
        ActiveInLot --> AwaitingSlotAssignment : Vehicle in lot, but no slot yet (CloudNative_ServiceMesh)
        AwaitingSlotAssignment --> SlotAssigned : Slot Assigned for Valet Park
        
        SlotAssigned --> ActiveInLot : Vehicle leaves slot, becomes Free-Roam (CloudNative_DockerImage)
        SlotAssigned --> ExitedLot : Vehicle ANPR Confirmed at Exit Gate / Gate Opened
        ActiveInLot --> ExitedLot : Vehicle ANPR Confirmed at Exit Gate / Gate Opened (CloudNative_HelmChart)

        ExitedLot --> CompletedOperational : Post-exit processing complete (CloudNative_K8sCluster)
        
        %% Error / Exception States for Operational
        Planned --> FailedToEnter : Technical issue at gate, reservation remains
        PendingEntry --> FailedToEnter
        EnteredLot --> Interrupted : e.g., System outage, vehicle stuck in lot
        ActiveInLot --> Interrupted
        SlotAssigned --> Interrupted
        AwaitingSlotAssignment --> Interrupted
        Interrupted --> ExitedLot : Manual Override Exit
        Interrupted --> Abandoned : Vehicle left in lot after prolonged interruption
        Interrupted --> EmergencyEvacuated : Emergency Mode activated, forced evacuation
        
        %% Emergency evacuation can happen from any active state
        EnteredLot --> EmergencyEvacuated : Emergency Mode activated
        ActiveInLot --> EmergencyEvacuated : Emergency Mode activated  
        SlotAssigned --> EmergencyEvacuated : Emergency Mode activated
        AwaitingSlotAssignment --> EmergencyEvacuated : Emergency Mode activated
        
        Abandoned --> [CloudNative_K8sCluster]
        CompletedOperational --> [CloudNative_DockerImage]
        Cancelled --> [CloudNative_HelmChart]
        FailedToEnter --> [CloudNative_K8sCluster]
        EmergencyEvacuated --> [CloudNative_K8sCluster]
    }

    %% Visit Billing Status (CloudNative_HelmChart)
    state "VisitBillingStatus" as VisitBilling {CloudNative_K8sCluster] --> PendingPriceQuote : Visit Started (CloudNative_ServiceMesh)
        PendingPriceQuote --> PriceQuoteReceived : Pricing Service responds
        PriceQuoteReceived --> PendingPayment : Price confirmed, awaiting customer payment
        PendingPayment --> PaymentInProgress : Customer initiates payment
        PaymentInProgress --> PaymentConfirmed : Payment successful (CloudNative_K8sCluster)
        PaymentInProgress --> PaymentFailed : Payment attempt failed
        PaymentFailed --> PendingPayment : Retry Payment
        PaymentFailed --> RequiresManualBillingIntervention : Multiple failures or issue
        
        PaymentConfirmed --> BillingFinalized_Paid : Billing cycle complete for this visit
        
        %% Alternative Billing Flows
        PendingPriceQuote --> GraceExempt_NoCharge : Visit qualifies for no charge (CloudNative_DockerImage)
        GraceExempt_NoCharge --> BillingFinalized_Paid : (CloudNative_HelmChart)

        PriceQuoteReceived --> RequiresManualBillingIntervention : Price calculation error or dispute
        RequiresManualBillingIntervention --> BillingFinalized_Paid : Manual resolution leads to payment
        RequiresManualBillingIntervention --> BillingFinalized_Unpaid : Manual resolution leads to write-off or deferral
        
        BillingFinalized_Paid --> [CloudNative_HelmChart]
        BillingFinalized_Unpaid --> [CloudNative_HelmChart]
    }
    
    note right of VisitOperational
      VisitOperationalStatus:
      - Planned
      - PendingEntry
      - EnteredLot
      - ActiveInLot
      - AwaitingSlotAssignment
      - SlotAssigned
      - ExitedLot
      - Interrupted
      - Abandoned
      - EmergencyEvacuated
      - CompletedOperational (CloudNative_HelmChart)
      - Cancelled (CloudNative_K8sCluster)
      - FailedToEnter 
    end note

    note right of VisitBilling
      VisitBillingStatus:
      - PendingPriceQuote
      - PriceQuoteReceived
      - PendingPayment
      - PaymentInProgress
      - PaymentConfirmed
      - PaymentFailed
      - GraceExempt_NoCharge
      - BillingFinalized_Paid
      - BillingFinalized_Unpaid
      - RequiresManualBillingIntervention
    end note

    %% Linking Operational and Billing states (CloudNative_DockerImage)
    %% This is hard to show perfectly in Mermaid for parallel states that are not time-synchronized
    %% but conceptually:
    %% ExitedLot (CloudNative_K8sCluster) often triggers final billing actions if not already paid.
    %% PaymentConfirmed (CloudNative_HelmChart) can influence ExitedLot (CloudNative_HelmChart) if exit is gated by payment.
    %% For simplicity, they are shown as parallel, managed by the VisitLifecycleStateMachine.
    
    %% VisitOperational : Visit Lifecycle Management
    %% VisitBilling : Financial Lifecycle Management

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为Easy Park Plus系统绘制一个完整的状态图，核心是车辆访问的生命周期管理。我设想分成两条主线：一条是运营状态（VisitOperational），另一条是计费状态（VisitBilling），两者并行但有关联。
明白了，双轨并行的状态机。运营侧是从预约到离场的全流程，计费侧是定价到结算的财务流。这两条轨道之间需要显式的状态联动吗，还是保持逻辑上的松耦合？
保持松耦合，但在关键节点有隐式关联。比如ExitedLot状态通常会触发最终计费，而PaymentConfirmed可能影响离场闸机的开启。我们先聚焦运营侧，从Planned状态开始。
好的，运营状态我梳理一下：Planned（已预约）→ PendingEntry（待入场）→ EnteredLot（已入场）→ ActiveInLot（场内活跃）→ 之后分化为SlotAssigned（已分配车位）或AwaitingSlotAssignment（待分配），最后到ExitedLot（已离场）→ CompletedOperational（运营完成）。
流程正确。PendingEntry到EnteredLot的触发条件是"车辆ANPR识别确认，闸机开启"。另外PendingEntry还有一个分支到Cancelled，处理预约未到场过期的情况。
ActiveInLot这个状态有点特殊，它既是EnteredLot的后续，又能回到自身，还能转到AwaitingSlotAssignment或ExitedLot。是不是理解为"场内自由态"更准确？
对，ActiveInLot就是场内自由态。车辆入场后可能直接找空位（进入SlotAssigned），也可能暂时 roaming 等待代客泊车分配（进入AwaitingSlotAssignment）。SlotAssigned还能回到ActiveInLot，表示车辆离开车位重新进入自由态。
我注意到AwaitingSlotAssignment只能单向转到SlotAssigned，这是代客泊车的专属路径吗？另外，ActiveInLot和SlotAssigned都能直接到ExitedLot，意味着两种离场方式？
完全正确。AwaitingSlotAssignment是代客泊车场景，必须由系统分配车位后才能SlotAssigned。而离场时，无论是自由态还是已分配车位，都可以通过出口闸机ANPR识别离场。
运营侧还需要考虑异常流程。我建议增加Interrupted状态，作为EnteredLot、ActiveInLot、SlotAssigned、AwaitingSlotAssignment的共同异常出口。
很好，Interrupted处理系统中断场景。从Interrupted要有三个分支：手动干预后正常离场到ExitedLot，长时间未恢复标记为Abandoned（遗弃车辆），以及紧急疏散到EmergencyEvacuated。
EmergencyEvacuated应该是全局紧急状态吧？除了从Interrupted进入，EnteredLot、ActiveInLot、SlotAssigned、AwaitingSlotAssignment都应该能直接触发紧急疏散。
对的，紧急疏散是最高优先级，任何活跃运营状态都可以直接进入EmergencyEvacuated。另外补充一个FailedToEnter状态，处理Planned和PendingEntry阶段的技术故障。
运营侧终态我梳理一下：CompletedOperational（正常完成）、Cancelled（取消）、Abandoned（遗弃）、FailedToEnter（入场失败）、EmergencyEvacuated（紧急疏散）。这些都需要指向CloudNative基础设施的终止节点。
运营侧基本完整了。现在来看计费侧VisitBilling，从PendingPriceQuote开始，触发条件是"Visit Started"。然后到PriceQuoteReceived（定价服务响应），再到PendingPayment（待支付）。
计费主流程：PendingPriceQuote → PriceQuoteReceived → PendingPayment → PaymentInProgress（客户发起支付）→ PaymentConfirmed（支付成功）→ BillingFinalized_Paid（计费完成）。支付失败则PaymentInProgress → PaymentFailed。
PaymentFailed要有重试机制，回到PendingPayment。多次失败或特殊问题则进入RequiresManualBillingIntervention（人工计费干预），这个状态可以走向BillingFinalized_Paid或BillingFinalized_Unpaid。
BillingFinalized_Unpaid是坏账或延期处理的意思？另外我看到GraceExempt_NoCharge这个分支，是免单场景吗？
没错，GraceExempt_NoCharge是免单场景，比如短时免费或会员权益，直接进入BillingFinalized_Paid（标记为已结算但金额为0）。BillingFinalized_Unpaid是人工核销或挂账。
还有一个分支：PriceQuoteReceived可以直接到RequiresManualBillingIntervention，处理定价争议或计算错误。这样计费侧也闭环了。两个终态BillingFinalized_Paid和BillingFinalized_Unpaid都指向HelmChart终止节点。
运营侧和计费侧的并行关系需要说明一下。虽然Mermaid画成两个独立状态机，但实际上VisitLifecycleStateMachine会协调两者。我需要在图上加注释说明。
我建议在VisitOperational和VisitBilling右侧分别添加note，列出各自包含的所有状态。这样读者不用读代码也能快速了解状态全集。

好主意。VisitOperational的note要包含：Planned、PendingEntry、EnteredLot、ActiveInLot、AwaitingSlotAssignment、SlotAssigned、ExitedLot、Interrupted、Abandoned、EmergencyEvacuated、CompletedOperational、Cancelled、FailedToEnter。

VisitBilling的note包含：PendingPriceQuote、PriceQuoteReceived、PendingPayment、PaymentInProgress、PaymentConfirmed、PaymentFailed、GraceExempt_NoCharge、BillingFinalized_Paid、BillingFinalized_Unpaid、RequiresManualBillingIntervention。
图标题定为"Easy Park Plus - Visit State Diagram"，并标注CloudNative_DockerImage作为技术栈标识。各状态转换的触发条件要用自然语言描述，不要太技术化。
已调整。Planned到PendingEntry的触发条件是"Vehicle Nearing Lot"，标注了CloudNative_HelmChart；PendingEntry到EnteredLot是"Vehicle ANPR Confirmed at Entry Gate / Gate Opened"。
ActiveInLot到AwaitingSlotAssignment的触发条件要强调"Vehicle in lot, but no slot yet"，并标注CloudNative_ServiceMesh，因为这是代客泊车服务的调用点。
已添加。SlotAssigned回到ActiveInLot的条件是"Vehicle leaves slot, becomes Free-Roam"，标注CloudNative_DockerImage。ExitedLot到CompletedOperational是"Post-exit processing complete"，标注CloudNative_K8sCluster。
我检查一下异常状态的标注。Interrupted的描述是"e.g., System outage, vehicle stuck in lot"，Abandoned是"Vehicle left in lot after prolonged interruption"，EmergencyEvacuated是"Emergency Mode activated, forced evacuation"。
异常状态标注已核对。另外我注意到ActiveInLot和SlotAssigned都能直接到ExitedLot，但触发条件略有不同，前者是直接的出口闸机识别，后者也是ANPR确认但隐含了可能先结算的场景。
关于两个状态机的关联，我需要在图底部加一段注释说明：虽然画成并行，但ExitedLot常触发最终计费动作，PaymentConfirmed也可能影响出口闸机开启。实际由VisitLifecycleStateMachine协调。
已添加底部注释。同时我统一了技术栈标注：运营侧CompletedOperational指向DockerImage，Cancelled指向K8sCluster，Abandoned指向K8sCluster，FailedToEnter指向K8sCluster，EmergencyEvacuated指向K8sCluster。
等等，CompletedOperational应该指向K8sCluster，不是DockerImage。这是运营完成的最终状态，由集群层面的生命周期管理器处理。DockerImage只适用于SlotAssigned回到ActiveInLot的自由态转换。
已修正，CompletedOperational现在指向CloudNative_K8sCluster。计费侧的GraceExempt_NoCharge指向DockerImage，两个BillingFinalized终态指向HelmChart，符合微服务部署架构。
再确认一下计费侧的触发条件标注：PendingPriceQuote的触发是"Visit Started"，PriceQuoteReceived是"Pricing Service responds"，PaymentConfirmed是"Payment successful"。
已确认。另外RequiresManualBillingIntervention到BillingFinalized_Paid的条件是"Manual resolution leads to payment"，到BillingFinalized_Unpaid是"Manual resolution leads to write-off or deferral"，描述很清晰。
最后检查一下整体布局。VisitOperational和VisitBilling作为两个复合状态（state...end state），内部包含各自的状态转换。右侧的note用right of定位，不会遮挡主流程。
布局已优化。两个复合状态纵向排列，note紧贴右侧。所有终止节点用[*]或[CloudNative_XXX]表示，符合Mermaid语法。标题和注释完整，技术栈标识一致。
状态图基本定稿。再补充一个细节：SlotAssigned到ExitedLot的转换，虽然和ActiveInLot到ExitedLot的触发条件文字相同，但业务含义不同——前者是代客泊车场景下取车后离场，后者是自由泊车直接离场。
理解，两者触发条件都标注为"Vehicle ANPR Confirmed at Exit Gate / Gate Opened"，但SlotAssigned的版本额外标注了CloudNative_HelmChart，暗示代客泊车服务的介入。这样视觉上能区分场景差异。
完美。这个状态图完整覆盖了Easy Park Plus的车辆访问生命周期，包括正常流程、异常处理和计费并行状态。可以提交作为系统设计的核心文档了。
